criteria.summary: Repo-local evidence proves the current runtime still selects polling on main and documents the conditions required for Telegram update delivery.
The silent `/start` symptom was traced to a Windows-specific Node HTTPS timeout to Telegram Bot API, while PowerShell Bot API access with the same token remains healthy.
The runtime fix is minimal and bounded to transport-level Telegram API fallback, preserving explicit `auto|polling|webhook` delivery semantics.
Regression coverage proves polling can recover via Windows PowerShell fallback, while honest degraded state remains when both transports fail.
A live runtime check on this host shows the new code starting in `polling/ready` and using the Windows PowerShell Bot API fallback during startup.
